findings.title: GET handler missing authentication
findings.detail: No auth check found in GET handler. Data endpoints should verify session.
findings.fix: Add `const session = await getServerSession(request);` and return 401 if null.

findings.title: POST handler missing authentication
findings.detail: No auth check found in POST handler. State-changing endpoints must verify session.
findings.fix: Add `const session = await getServerSession(request);` and return 401 if null.
